summary: Iteration 59: Testing 5 critical timeout fixes for GPT-4o Vision AI Designer. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified via Playwright with 13/13 data-testid elements found. All requested timeout fixes confirmed in code.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/ai-designer/photo-generate returns 422 when no photos (validation working)
✅ server.py uses gpt-4o-mini model for Vision analysis (line 2759: .with_model('openai', 'gpt-4o-mini'))
✅ retry_with_backoff async function exists in server.py (line 2724)
✅ retry_with_backoff used for both vision and image generation (lines 2767, 2814)
✅ PIL image resize logic exists for photos >2MB (lines 2670-2690)
✅ retryWithBackoff function exists (line 326) - 3 retries, 2000ms base delay
✅ retryWithBackoff wraps the axios API call (line 402)
✅ ProductSearchPage.jsx has valid JSX syntax (no broken fragments)
✅ All data-testid attributes present in AIDesignerPage.jsx
✅ pkg-1 (69EUR), pkg-2 (129EUR), pkg-3 (199EUR) package buttons found
✅ budget-1000-0, budget-2500-0, budget-5000-0 buttons found (EUR values)
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 timeout fixes verified in code:
1. ✅ Timeout set to 300s (5 min) - frontend/AIDesignerPage.jsx line 405: timeout: 300000
2. ✅ Base64 upload - server.py uploads photos as base64, not URLs
3. ✅ Resize images to <2MB - server.py lines 2670-2690 using PIL with LANCZOS filter
5. ✅ Retry with exponential backoff - both server.py (line 2724) and frontend (line 326)
Budget values correctly changed from лв (BGN) to EUR: 1,000 EUR, 2,500 EUR, 5,000 EUR
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59 verified all 5 timeout fixes for GPT-4o Vision AI Designer: 1) 300s timeout in frontend, 2) Base64 upload (not URL), 3) PIL resize to <2MB, 4) gpt-4o-mini model for faster Vision analysis, 5) retry_with_backoff in both backend and frontend. Budget values are now EUR (1000, 2500, 5000). The actual AI generation takes 30-60s+ and was skipped - code changes verified only. ProductSearchPage.jsx JSX syntax is valid.

base64_upload.details: Photos encoded as base64 before API calls

image_resize_2mb.details: PIL Image resize with LANCZOS filter, max 1920px dimension

retry_with_backoff_backend.details: async def retry_with_backoff with max_retries=3, base_delay=2

budget_eur_values.details: Budget buttons show EUR: 1,000 EUR, 2,500 EUR, 5,000 EUR

product_search_page_syntax.details: ProductSearchPage.jsx has valid JSX with balanced fragments
